diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 486d595..ae0dd68 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -150,2 +150,8 @@ Week 23 / day 154 observations:
 - Social still complains about quotas and support, but raising C quota again could create a compute shock. Hold C quota at 500k this week and measure another cycle.
 - Week 23 action: hold prices, quotas, C tier 4, tier 3 capacity, no ads/dev, lean S2 ops; repeat $9 E3 offers.
+
+Week 24 / day 161 observations:
+- Cash fell to $27.0k. Next billing window is weak (~$32.6k) and cannot cover tier 3 capacity plus C tier 4 compute.
+- Usage has fallen to ~4.46M/week, so tier 2 may be viable again. Need to save fixed capacity cost and compute to avoid a cash cliff.
+- Week 24 action: switch capacity tier 3 -> 2 and C model tier 4 -> 3 for one survival week. Keep prices, A/B/C quotas (C remains 500k), no ads/dev, and lean S2 ops.
+- This may risk downgrades/quality perception and overload, but cash survival requires cutting weekly burn. Repeat $9 E3 offers only.
